findings.description: The table's first column lists `-classpath %CLASSPATH%` and `%batchArgs%` as arguments, but neither `-classpath` nor `%batchArgs%` appears in the hints. The other three table arguments (`-diConfig`, `-requestPath`, `-userId`) are all present as hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block: `java -classpath %CLASSPATH% nablarch.fw.launcher.Main ... %batchArgs%`; comment: `# %batchArgs% -> バッチアプリケーションで必要となる引数やオプションを設定してください。`
